coreMeaning.en: the current geological epoch, from ~11,700 years ago

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Holocene = holo(全)+cene(新世) → 全新世，冰河期后人类文明兴起的时代

coreMeaning.en: a three-dimensional image formed by holography

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: hologram = holo(全)+gram(图) → 全息图，360°立体图像
holograms = hologram的复数

coreMeaning.en: a document written entirely in the author's own hand; also a hologram

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: holograph = holo(全)+graph(写) → 完全由本人亲笔写的文件

coreMeaning.en: relating to holograms; written entirely in the author's own hand

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: holographic = holograph+ic → 全息的；亲笔的
holography = holo+graphy → 全息摄影技术

coreMeaning.en: a word that names the whole of which a given word is a part

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: holonym = holo(整体)+onym(词) → 整体词（如body是hand的整体词）

coreMeaning.en: a holder for a pistol; to put a gun in its holster

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: holster → 来自荷兰语holster（皮套）→ 手枪皮套
holstered gun = 入套的手枪 → 已收枪、放松警戒

coreMeaning.en: dedicated to God; sacred; morally perfect

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: holy → whole(完整无缺) → 神圣纯洁的

coreMeaning.cn: 砂石（擦洗甲板用）；用砂石擦甲板
coreMeaning.en: a soft sandstone used to scrub a ship's deck; to scrub with it

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: holystone = 圣石 → 水手用来擦甲板的砂石（名字来历不明，可能因为擦船需要跪着像祈祷）

coreMeaning.en: special honor or respect shown publicly; feudal allegiance

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: homage → homme(人)+age → 向人表示效忠；致敬

coreMeaning.en: the place where one lives; to the place of residence

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: home → 古英语ham → 家；hit home（触动心弦）

coreMeaning.en: beer made at home; homemade software or hardware

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: homebrew = home+brew → 家酿啤酒；自制软件（黑客文化）

coreMeaning.cn: 在家的；回家途中的；不能外出的
coreMeaning.en: confined to home; traveling toward home

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: homebound = home+bound → 被困家中或回家途中

coreMeaning.cn: 返乡；归来；（美）校友返校聚会
coreMeaning.en: a return home; a school/college event welcoming back alumni

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: homecoming = 归家 → 返乡；美国校友返校节

coreMeaning.cn: 本土种植的；本地的；自家培育的
coreMeaning.en: grown or produced at home or locally

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: homegrown = 家里/本地种出来的 → 本土的、自家的

coreMeaning.en: one's native land; a country or region that one comes from

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: homeland = 家+土地 → 祖国、故土

coreMeaning.en: without a home; people without homes

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: homeless = home(家)+less(无) → 无家可归的

coreMeaning.en: a leather case for a pistol; to put into a holster

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: holster → 皮制枪套
holomorphic = 全形的 → 处处可微分的复变函数

coreMeaning.cn: 单词句的；用一个词表达整个思想的
coreMeaning.en: expressing a whole sentence or idea in a single word

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: holophrastic = 整句式 → 幼儿用单词表达整句话（如mama=我要妈妈）

coreMeaning.en: a breed of large black-and-white dairy cattle

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Holsteins → 德国荷尔斯泰因地区的黑白奶牛

coreMeaning.cn: 水獭巢穴；（诗）树丛；小山丘
coreMeaning.en: an otter's burrow; a small wood or copse

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: holt → 古英语holt（森林/树丛）→ 水獭巢、树林

coreMeaning.cn: 圣地（以色列/巴勒斯坦地区）

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: holyland = 神圣土地 → 三大宗教的圣地以色列/巴勒斯坦

coreMeaning.en: a person who buys a home

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: home-buyer = 买房者

coreMeaning.en: people of one's home community or family

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: homefolk = 家乡的人们 → 乡亲

coreMeaning.en: the civilian population of a country at war; domestic affairs during wartime

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: homefront = 国内战线 → 战时国内的民众和后方工作

coreMeaning.cn: 宅男宅女（复数）；喜欢待在家里的人
coreMeaning.en: people who prefer staying at home

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: homebodies = 爱宅家的人们

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: homeboy = 家乡的小伙 → 老乡、哥们（嘻哈文化）

coreMeaning.en: companies or people that build homes

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: homebuilders = 房屋建筑公司/承建商

coreMeaning.en: the business or activity of building homes

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: homebuilding = 住宅建造业

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: homed in on = 锁定目标（如导弹）

holsters = holster的复数
holstern = holster的名词词源标记

holystones = holystone复数
homagra = 肩(hom)+痛(agra) → 肩关节痛风

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Hombitan：二氧化钛的商品名称

coreMeaning.cn: 致敬；表示尊重（动词词源标记）

homagen = homage的名词词源标记

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: holonyms = 整体词汇集合
